pages.title: Mutation Chance
pages.text: $(li)Base chance: 5%.$(br)$(li)+0.5% per generation for the first 20 generations.$(br)$(li)+1% per point of maximum parental gene difference.$(br)$(li)Maximum chance: 25%.$(br2)Special results can exceed the ordinary gene range.

pages.title: Speed Is Continuous
pages.text: $(li)Speed genes run from 1 to 10.$(br)$(li)Every point changes incubation time.$(br)$(li)Nutrition, Purity, and Data improve the environment multiplier.$(br)$(li)The screen ETA and machine use the same calculation.$(br2)Breed for speed when you want a shorter production cycle.
